EmailNotification.body: This is an auto test email body

faqQA.q: What documents are required to complete agent onboarding?
faqQA.a: Agents must submit a government-issued ID, real estate license, E&O insurance certificate, and a signed independent contractor agreement before activation.

faqQA.q: How long does the agent onboarding process typically take?
faqQA.a: The standard onboarding process takes 3–5 business days, provided all required documents are submitted and verified without issues.

faqQA.q: What is the process for setting up MLS access during onboarding?
faqQA.a: MLS access is provisioned after your license is verified. You will receive an email with credentials within 48 hours of completing the document submission step.

faqQA.q: How do I complete my profile after joining the brokerage?
faqQA.a: Log in to the portal, navigate to My Profile, upload your headshot, fill in your bio, and enter your contact details. A complete profile improves client trust.

faqQA.q: What training is mandatory for newly onboarded agents?
faqQA.a: All new agents must complete the compliance orientation, fair housing training, and the CRM platform walkthrough within the first 14 days of onboarding.

faqQA.q: How do I get my business cards and marketing materials after onboarding?
faqQA.a: Once onboarding is approved, submit your design request through the Marketing Portal. Standard business cards are ready within 5 business days.

faqQA.q: What commission structure applies during the probation period?
faqQA.a: During the first 90 days, new agents are on a 70/30 split. After completing the probation review, you move to the standard plan outlined in your agreement.

faqQA.q: How do I connect my e-signature account during onboarding?
faqQA.a: Go to Settings > Integrations and link your DocuSign or DotLoop account. This is required before you can send contracts through the platform.

faqQA.q: Who is my point of contact if I have questions during onboarding?
faqQA.a: Your assigned onboarding coordinator is your primary contact. Their details are in the welcome email. You can also reach the support team via the Help Desk.

faqQA.q: When will I receive my agent ID and portal login credentials?
faqQA.a: Your agent ID and portal credentials are emailed within 24 hours of submitting your completed onboarding package and passing the background check.
